extensiondistributor-desc: Kordhin loogu talagalay qaybinta kaydadka sawir-qaadista ee kordhinnada
extdist-list-missing-extensions: Lama soo heli karo liiska kordhinnada!
extdist-list-missing-skins: Lama soo heli karo liiska muuqaal maqaarada!
extdist-no-such-skins: Muuqaal maqaar noocaas ah ma jiro "$1".
extdist-choose-extensions: Dooro kordhinta aad rabto inaad soo dejiso:
extdist-choose-skins: Dooro muuqaal maqaarka aad rabto inaad soo dejiso:
extdist-choose-version-extensions: Waxaad soo dejisanaysaa kordhinta $1. Dooro nooca MediaWiki kaaga. Inta badan kordhinnadu waxay ku shaqeeyaan noocyo badan oo MediaWiki ah, sidaas darteed haddii noocaaga MediaWiki aanu halkan ku jirin, ama haddii aad u baahan tahay astaamaha ugu dambeeya ee kordhinta, isku day inaad isticmaasho nooca hadda jira.
extdist-choose-version-skins: Waxaad soo dejisanaysaa muuqaal-maqaarka $1. Dooro nooca MediaWiki kaaga. Inta badan muuqaal maqaaradu waxay ku shaqeeyaan noocyo badan oo MediaWiki ah, sidaas darteed haddii noocaaga MediaWiki aanu halkan ku jirin, ama haddii aad u baahan tahay astaamaha ugu dambeeya ee muuqaal maqaarka, isku day inaad isticmaasho nooca hadda jira.
extdist-no-versions-extensions: Kordhinta la doortay ($1) lagama heli karo wax nooc ah!
extdist-no-versions-skins: Muuqaal maqaarka la doortay ($1) lagama heli karo wax nooc ah!
extdist-created-extensions:
Nooc sawir ah oo ka mid ah nooca $2 ee kordhinta $1 ee MediaWiki $3 ayaa la sameeyay. Soo dejintaadu si toos ah ayey u bilaaban doontaa 5 ilbiriqsi gudahood. URL-ka sawirkan waa: :$4 Waxaad isticmaali kartaa xiriiriyahaan si aad kordhinta ugu soo dejiso kombiyuutar kasta, laakiin fadlan ha calaamadeen, maadaama waxa ku jira aan la cusboonaysiin doonin, lagana yaabo in mar dambe la tirtiro. Waa inaad ka soo saartaa faylka tarka galka kordhinta ee rakibidda MediaWiki kaaga. Tusaale ahaan, nidaam Unix-like ah: 
tar -xzf $5 -C /var/www/mediawiki/extensions
Windows-ka, waxaad isticmaali kartaa [http://www.7-zip.org/ 7-zip] si aad u furto faylasha. Haddii wiki-gaagu ku yaal server fog, ka soo saar faylasha kombiyuutarkaaga ka dibna dhammaan faylasha la soo furay ku geli galka kordhinta ee server-ka. Kadib marka aad faylasha soo saarto, waa inaad ku diiwaangelisaa extension LocalSettings.php. Dukumentiga kordhinta ayaa bixin doona tilmaamo ku saabsan sida tan loo sameeyo. Haddii aad qabto su'aalo ku saabsan nidaamkan qaybinta kordhinta, fadlan booqo [[Extension talk:ExtensionDistributor]].
extdist-created-skins:
Nooc sawirka ah oo ka mid ah nooca $2 ee muuqaal maqaarka $1 ee MediaWiki $3 ayaa la sameeyay. Soo dejintaadu si toos ah ayey u bilaaban doontaa 5 ilbiriqsi gudahood. URL-ka sawirkan waa: :$4 Waxaad isticmaali kartaa xiriiriyahaan si aad muuqaal maqaarka ugu soo dejiso kombiyuutar kasta, laakiin fadlan ha calaameen, maadaama waxa ku jira aan la cusboonaysiin doonin, lagana yaabo in mar dambe la tirtiro. Waa inaad ka soo saartaa faylka tarka galka skins ee rakibidda MediaWiki kaaga. Tusaale ahaan, nidaam Unix-like ah: 
tar -xzf $5 -C /var/www/mediawiki/skins
Windows-ka, waxaad isticmaali kartaa [http://www.7-zip.org/ 7-zip] si aad u furto faylasha. Haddii wiki-gaagu ku yaal server fog, ka soo saar faylasha kombiyuutarkaaga ka dibna dhammaan faylasha la soo furay ku geli galka skins ee server-ka. Kadib marka aad faylasha soo saarto, waa inaad ku diiwaangelisaa muuqaalka maqaarka LocalSettings.php. Dukumentiga muuqaalka maqaarka ayaa bixin doona tilmaamo ku saabsan sida tan loo sameeyo. Haddii aad qabto su'aalo ku saabsan nidaamkan qaybinta muuqaalka maqaarka, fadlan booqo [[Extension talk:ExtensionDistributor]].
extdist-tar-error: Lama soo heli karo URL-ka kaydka ee API-ga kaydka.
extdist-no-branches: Lama soo heli karo macluumaad ku saabsan laamo kasta.
extdist-popular-extensions: Kordhinnada ugu badan ee la soo dejistay {{PLURAL:$1|$1 kordhin|$1 kordhinno}}:
extdist-popular-skins: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 muuqaal maqaar|$1 muuqaal maqaarro}} ugu badan:
